context: Agricultural cooperative discourse on market participation vs. solidarity economics. Inspired by fieldwork themes from GLR Páramo region (2019-2020), but constructed for demonstration purposes.
note: This scenario demonstrates the structural position of the epistemic critique (a6) as a Belnap B (dialetheia): the critique cannot be dismissed (it forces a3 to respond, it survives the attenuation gate) yet it cannot escape the condition it diagnoses (a3 answers in the only available language, market language). The dialetheia is not in a6's σ* alone — it is in the structural conflict between a3 and a4, both accepted, with a6 as the atom that makes that conflict explicit.

atoms.name: a1_market_income
atoms.description: Market prices have increased our income (Speaker GR, market-experienced)

atoms.name: a2_intermediary_dependency
atoms.description: But we depend on intermediaries now (Speaker AC, critical)

atoms.name: a3_collective_decision
atoms.description: The cooperative decides collectively (Speaker GR, market-experienced)

atoms.name: a4_market_coercion
atoms.description: Market forces us to grow what they want (Speaker LO, land manager)

atoms.name: a5_autonomy
atoms.description: We maintain autonomy over production (Speaker NR, cooperative founder)

atoms.name: a6_epistemic_critique
atoms.description: Development agencies teach us market language (Speaker AC, analytical)
atoms.note: Automatic subject atom — perplexity near attenuation threshold. Attacked by a3 (collective decision contests the critique by enacting the condition it diagnoses).

output.note: Generated by running warg 0.1.0.0 binary. All values verified.

results.name: a1_market_income
results.interpretation: Below threshold — income claim weakened by attacks from a2 and a6 (σ*=1.0 without a3→a6; reduced here because a6 is itself contested)

results.name: a2_intermediary_dependency
results.interpretation: Dependency critique holds — qualifies a1, itself attacked by a3

results.name: a3_collective_decision
results.interpretation: Barely above threshold — answers a6 by asserting collective agency, but only in the language of the market. The answer enacts the condition the critique diagnoses.

results.name: a4_market_coercion
results.interpretation: Most accepted claim — structural coercion is the dominant outcome. Confirms the truth side of a6's dialetheia: the cooperative IS coerced.

results.name: a5_autonomy
results.interpretation: Most weakened — attacked by both a1 and a6, and a1 is itself weakened

results.name: a6_epistemic_critique
results.interpretation: Present, recognized, below 0.5 — necessary and important but insubstantial for autonomy. The critique cannot be dismissed (forces a3 to respond) but cannot provide an exit from the condition it names.

dialetheia_structure.description: a6 is a Belnap B atom — both true and false. The dialetheia is not in a6's σ* alone; it is distributed across the topology.
dialetheia_structure.truth_side: a4_market_coercion σ*=0.637 (accepted) — the cooperative IS structurally coerced. a6 is correct.
dialetheia_structure.false_side: a3_collective_decision σ*=0.505 (accepted) — collective agency persists. The cooperative's use of market language is a decision, not pure imposition. a6 is contested.
dialetheia_structure.critique_position: a6 σ*=0.471 — names the tension between a3 and a4, cannot resolve it. Adorno's non-identity: the critique cannot be synthesised away, but also cannot escape the condition it diagnoses.
dialetheia_structure.year_1_note: The Belnap B value V(a6)=B is formally expressible only at the cubun/PVAF layer (Year 1 coupling). The h-categoriser alone produces σ*∈[0,1]; the dialetheia is in the topology, not the scalar.

automatic_subject.significance: Meta-epistemic critique of colonial development language survives the gate (21.0 < 21.769). Threshold choice is political: setting corpus_max at 21.769 preserves this claim at the corpus ceiling.

llm_failure_mode.standard_summarization: Would flatten to 'mixed views' or 'trade-off' narrative, resolving the tension
llm_failure_mode.warg_preservation: Attack topology preserved; a3 and a4 both accepted in structural conflict; a6 structurally present but insubstantial — the irresolution is the result
